_note: Keep in sync with decky-proton-pulse scoring.ts WEIGHTS and algorithm
formula: (rating + recency + customProton + protonMatch + playtimeConfidence) * gpuMult * osMult * kernelMult + notesSentiment + sourcePenalty
sourcePenaltyNote: Native Pulse reports (source='user') receive SOURCE_PULSE_PENALTY=-5 until the Pulse report base grows enough to match ProtonDB's confidence. ProtonDB CDN and live reports receive no penalty. See Architecture.md for details.
playtimeConfidenceNote: Reports that declare actual playtime earn a confidence bonus applied inside the GPU/OS/kernel multiplier bracket. Meaningful confidence starts at 2h (oneToFourHours=+6). Buckets: underOneHour=+3, oneToFourHours=+6, fourToTenHours=+9, overTenHours=+12. Reports with no playtime (unreported/empty) receive no bonus.

tiers.name: platinum
tiers.rule: Can install, start, and play. No faults. Works out of the box without any tinkering.

tiers.name: gold
tiers.rule: Can install, start, and play. No faults. Works but required tinkering (launch options, config, etc.).

tiers.name: silver
tiers.rule: Can install, start, and play. Exactly 2 faults reported (e.g. graphical + performance).

tiers.name: bronze
tiers.rule: Can install, start, and play. 3 or more faults. Playable but with significant issues.

tiers.name: borked
tiers.rule: Cannot install, cannot start, cannot begin playing, or overall verdict is No.

outOfBoxNote: Only shown when verdict is Yes and no faults are reported. Answering Yes elevates Gold to Platinum.
quickReference: Can't play or verdict No  = Borked
durationAutoFillNote: When submitting from the plugin, duration is pre-filled from your actual playtime. Time logged with the active config is weighted 1.25x over total Steam playtime -- hours with that exact setup matter more than lifetime hours across all configs.

ratingDerivation._note: Canonical algorithm in src/lib/scoring.ts:deriveRating(). Mirrors ProtonDB's inferLiveRating exactly. Rating is never chosen manually -- always derived from structured form answers.
ratingDerivation._source: src/lib/scoring.ts deriveRating (canonical) -- imported by NativePulseReportModal and protondb.ts inferLiveRating

installAndStartup._note: If any of these are 'no', the report is immediately borked regardless of other answers.

ratingDerivation.tinkeringNote: Tinkering (GE proton, winetricks, etc.) does not cap the rating by itself. A tinker report can still reach platinum if verdictOob='yes' (the user confirmed it also works without tinkering).
